scenario.title: Agent risk verdict on each PR
steps: Verify diff-analyzer unit tests pass (14 tests)
Verify new types compile in shared/ipc.ts
Verify PrVerdictService syncs verdicts on PR list update
Verify risk-level chips are rendered in InboxPanel and InboxView
Verify pnpm typecheck passes (no new type errors)

assertions.description: diff-analyzer: 14 unit tests pass covering empty diff, small/medium/large changes, risk patterns, binary files
shared/ipc.ts: PrRiskLevel, PrVerdict, GetPrVerdictParams, GetPrVerdictResult types compile
shared/ipc.ts: headSha field added to PrAwaitingReviewItem
shared/ipc.ts: prVerdict optional field added to InboxItem
ipc-validation.ts: get-pr-verdict added to INFRA_ACTIONS array
main/index.ts: GhPrJson includes headRefOid, --json flag updated, mapped to headSha
main/index.ts: handleGetPrVerdict runs gh pr diff and delegates to analyzeDiff
PrVerdictService: cache keyed by repo:number, syncs on PR list update, invalidates on headSha change
MockPrVerdictService: provides verdicts for 3 mock PRs (high, low, medium)
InboxView.tsx: PrVerdictDisplay component renders risk chip + verdict text
InboxPanel.tsx: PrVerdictDisplayPanel component renders risk chip + verdict text
theme.css: CSS for .pr-risk-chip (low/medium/high/uncertain/pending) and verdict text
pnpm typecheck: no new type errors introduced

prMarkdown:
## Visual Evidence

**Change:** Agent risk verdict on each PR (gh-149)

**Status:** Passed (non-visual verification)

> Screenshot capture was blocked by infrastructure constraints (no display server or GUI system libraries available in this environment). All acceptance criteria were verified through unit tests (14 passing), TypeScript compilation, and code review.

### Verified
- Diff analyzer heuristic engine with 14 unit tests covering all risk levels and edge cases
- PR inbox items display risk-level chips (low/medium/high/uncertain) with verdict text
- Verdicts are cached by `(repo, number, headSha)` and auto-invalidated on PR head changes
- Mock adapter provides sample verdicts for browser-only development
- All i18n keys added for new UI strings
